name: IncidentsResponse
description: Response containing a paginated list of incidents

included.description: Related resources included in the response based on the include query parameter

meta.description: Metadata about the incidents list response

pagination.description: Pagination information for navigating through results

next_offset.description: The offset to use in the next request to retrieve the next page

prev_offset.description: The offset to use to retrieve the previous page

size.description: The number of incidents in this page

total_count.description: The total number of incidents matching the filter criteria
